parameters.formDescription: Anonymous monthly pulse — ~3 minutes. Results are reported only in aggregate (groups under 5 are suppressed) and are used to prioritise platform/DevOps improvements, never to evaluate individuals. Scale: 1 = strongly disagree … 7 = strongly agree.

values.fieldLabel: team
role_family
tenure_band
Q1 I am satisfied with our ability to deliver software effectively.
Q2 The platform tooling and standards help me get work done.
Q3 I can complete routine tasks without unnecessary tickets or hand-holding.
Q4 CI feedback is fast enough for normal day-to-day work.
Q5 Pull request review turnaround supports steady progress.
Q6 Build and test failures are easy to diagnose and fix.
Q7 My local development environment is reliable and reproducible.
Q8 I know the recommended path for images, CI/CD, secrets, deployment, environments.
Q9 Engineering documentation is easy to find and accurate.
Q10 I usually have enough uninterrupted time for deep work.
Q11 Interruptions from meetings, support, and incidents are manageable.
Q12 Releasing to production feels safe and predictable.
Q13 Security and compliance controls fit into normal engineering flow.
Q14 Production issues are detected and routed effectively.
Q15 I understand service ownership and escalation paths.
Q16 Shared platform standards save me time.
Q17 I would recommend our internal platform/delivery experience to another engineer.
Q18 Changes made in the last month improved my day-to-day work.
What slowed you down most this month?
What should the platform team fix next?
Which change helped most?

parameters.query:
WITH s AS (
  INSERT INTO survey (name, framework, month)
  VALUES ('Monthly pulse', 'SPACE+DevEx', date_trunc('month', now())::date)
  ON CONFLICT (month, synthetic) DO UPDATE SET name = survey.name
  RETURNING id
), r AS (
  INSERT INTO survey_response (survey_id, team, role_family, tenure_band)
  SELECT id, $1, $2, $3 FROM s
  RETURNING id
)
INSERT INTO survey_answer (response_id, question_id, score)
SELECT r.id, q.id, v.score
FROM r
JOIN (VALUES
  ('Q1',$4::int),('Q2',$5::int),('Q3',$6::int),('Q4',$7::int),('Q5',$8::int),
  ('Q6',$9::int),('Q7',$10::int),('Q8',$11::int),('Q9',$12::int),('Q10',$13::int),
  ('Q11',$14::int),('Q12',$15::int),('Q13',$16::int),('Q14',$17::int),('Q15',$18::int),
  ('Q16',$19::int),('Q17',$20::int),('Q18',$21::int)
) AS v(code, score) ON true
JOIN survey_question q ON q.code = v.code;
